Sign in to your workspace
Min 10 chars, with upper, lower and a digit.
Local accounts, Argon2id-hashed. First account becomes admin.

Current brief

Settings

Configuration & integrations.

Users & access

The first account is the administrator. Admins add users and set roles. Roles: admin (manage everything), analyst (run & edit), viewer (read-only).

—

Account

Language

AI provider

Classification / Auditsimple → Codex gpt-5.5
Extraction / Correlationstandard → Claude Sonnet
Risk / Investigation / Askcomplex → Claude Opus 4.8
High data densityescalates → Claude Opus

Auto routes by task complexity: critical/high-density to Claude (Opus 4.8 → Sonnet), simpler to Codex. Override models with CORTEX_MODEL_COMPLEX / _STANDARD / _SIMPLE.

Connect a source

LLM backends

—

Saved connectors (this project)

—

Transform store

Installed transforms

—

API keys

Keys are stored encrypted-at-rest scope (0600) in ~/.cortexintel and only passed to transforms. Values are never shown back.

Service
Key
—

Classifier plugins

Extend field mappings, risk signals and prompts (no code execution).

No plugins installed.

Manifest format


              

              

                
Active project

                  

                    
                    
                    
                  

              

              

                
Security posture

                  

                    
Password hashingArgon2id

                    
Password policy10+ / upper·lower·digit

                    
Lockout5 fails / 15 min

                    
Sessionbearer token · 12h

                    
API keys at rest0600, never returned

                    
DB passwordsenv-only, not persisted

                    
Transform sandboxruns local python/rust — review before install

✦

      
I can summarize the investigation, jump to any area, or run an action. Try: “summarize this case”, “go to entities”, “generate intelligence”, “show high-risk in the graph”, “export a PDF report”.

      
↵ send · Esc close · this assistant works across the whole app
